title: ReadOnlyChangeView
description: Drafted and discarded changes are loaded for display and audit without exposing a mutable `Change` aggregate. `ReadOnlyChangeView` is the shared read-only contract for those projections. `DraftedChangeView` and `DiscardedChangeView` extend it with storage-specific fields.
context: Drafted and discarded changes are loaded for display and audit without exposing a mutable `Change` aggregate. `ReadOnlyChangeView` is the shared read-only contract for those projections. `DraftedChangeView` and `DiscardedChangeView` extend it with storage-specific fields.

rules:
`ReadOnlyChangeView` MUST define the common read accessors required for non-active change display:

- `name`, `createdAt`, `description`
- `state` (derived lifecycle state at time of load)
- `specIds`, `workspaces`
- `schemaName`, `schemaVersion`
- `artifacts` — read-only view of artifact aggregate state (status, file keys; not file content)
- `history` — read-only view of append-only events when needed for display

Types that extend `ReadOnlyChangeView` MUST NOT add mutating methods. They MUST NOT expose `transition`, `updateSpecIds`, `draft`, `restore`, `discard`, `invalidate`, approval mutators, or any other operation that appends events or mutates artifact state.

rules.requirement: No escape hatch to mutable Change
rules:
Implementations of `ReadOnlyChangeView` (including `DraftedChangeView` and `DiscardedChangeView`) MUST NOT provide a public accessor that returns the wrapped `Change` instance (for example `change`, `unwrap`, or `toChange`).

Only `ChangeRepository` internals (`mutateDraft`, `save` during allowed draft mutations, and the shared read-only facade factory) MAY hold the mutable aggregate.

The core package MUST provide a single internal facade class (for example `ReadOnlyChangeFacade`) that implements both `DraftedChangeView` and `DiscardedChangeView` by wrapping one loaded `Change`.

The package MUST expose factory functions:

- `toDraftedChangeView(change: Change): DraftedChangeView` — throws if `!change.isDrafted`
- `toDiscardedChangeView(change: Change): DiscardedChangeView` — throws if the latest history event is not `discarded`

`ChangeRepository.getDraft`, `getDiscarded`, `listDrafts`, and `listDiscarded` MUST map persisted manifests through these factories (or equivalent private construction in the same module). Callers MUST NOT construct facades from arbitrary in-memory `Change` instances in production code.

Loading artifact file content remains the responsibility of `ChangeRepository.artifact` and related port methods when invoked with the correct storage context. `ReadOnlyChangeView` types MUST NOT include artifact body content.

constraints: ReadOnlyChangeView is a TypeScript interface contract, not a replacement for the Change entity.
Active changes continue to use Change via get / mutate.

scenarios.name: Drafted view exposes shared fields
given: a drafted change named parked-feature with specIds ['core:change'] and schema schema-std@1
then: the result satisfies ReadOnlyChangeView
AND name is parked-feature
AND specIds equals ['core:change']
AND schemaName and schemaVersion match the persisted manifest

scenarios.name: Discarded view exposes shared fields
given: a discarded change with terminal discarded event
then: the result satisfies ReadOnlyChangeView
AND artifacts is a read-only map with derived statuses but no file bodies

scenarios.name: View types omit mutating methods
when: inspecting DraftedChangeView and DiscardedChangeView public APIs
then: neither type declares transition, draft, restore, discard, or invalidate

scenarios.requirement: No escape hatch to mutable Change
scenarios.name: Repository view has no unwrap accessor
when: a DraftedChangeView is returned from getDraft(name)
then: the object has no public change, unwrap, or toChange property

scenarios.requirement: No escape hatch to mutable Change
scenarios.name: Discarded view has no unwrap accessor
when: a DiscardedChangeView is returned from getDiscarded(name)
then: the object has no public change, unwrap, or toChange property

scenarios.requirement: No escape hatch to mutable Change
scenarios.name: Factories return facade instances only
then: the returned object is not an instance of domain Change

scenarios.name: Single facade backs drafted views
given: a drafted Change loaded from drafts/
then: the result satisfies DraftedChangeView and ReadOnlyChangeView
AND isDrafted === true

scenarios.name: Single facade backs discarded views
given: a Change whose latest history event is discarded with reason obsolete
then: the result satisfies DiscardedChangeView and ReadOnlyChangeView
AND discardReason is obsolete

scenarios.name: Discarded factory rejects non-terminal change
given: a Change whose latest history event is transitioned to designing
then: it throws a domain error

scenarios.name: Drafted factory rejects active change
given: a Change with isDrafted === false under changes/
then: it throws a domain error

scenarios.name: Drafted factory rejects discarded change
given: a Change whose latest history event is discarded
then: it throws a domain error

scenarios.name: getDraft does not load artifact bodies into the view
given: a drafted change with on-disk proposal.md content
then: the view's artifact entries include status metadata only
AND proposal.md text is not a property on the view

scenarios.name: getDiscarded does not load artifact bodies into the view
given: a discarded change with on-disk delta files
then: the view does not include merged spec or delta file content

scenarios.name: Artifact content still loadable via repository.artifact
when: ChangeRepository.artifact is called with the internal drafted context for that name
then: artifact file content may be loaded separately from the view

optimizedDescription: Read-only change projection shared by drafted and discarded views; exposes status, artifacts, no mutable `Change` escape.
optimizedContext:
# ReadOnlyChangeView

## Rules
- Shared read-only surface: `ReadOnlyChangeView` MUST define common read accessors required for non-active change display: `name`, `createdAt`, `description` `state` (derived lifecycle state at time of load) `specIds`, `workspaces` `schemaName`, `schemaVersion` `artifacts` — read-only view of artifact aggregate state (status, file keys; not file content) `history` — read-only view of append-only events when needed for display Types extend `ReadOnlyChangeView` MUST NOT add mutating methods. They MUST NOT expose `transition`, `updateSpecIds`, `draft`, `restore`, `discard`, `invalidate`, approval mutators, or any other operation appends events or mutates artifact state.
- No escape hatch to mutable Change: Implementations of `ReadOnlyChangeView` (including `DraftedChangeView` and `DiscardedChangeView`) MUST NOT provide public accessor returns wrapped `Change` instance (for example `change`, `unwrap`, or `toChange`). Only `ChangeRepository` internals (`mutateDraft`, `save` during allowed draft mutations, and shared read-only facade factory) MAY hold mutable aggregate.
- Shared implementation: core package MUST provide single internal facade class (for example `ReadOnlyChangeFacade`) implements both `DraftedChangeView` and `DiscardedChangeView` by wrapping one loaded `Change`. package MUST expose factory functions: `toDraftedChangeView(change: Change): DraftedChangeView` — throws if `!change.isDrafted` `toDiscardedChangeView(change: Change): DiscardedChangeView` — throws if latest history event is not `discarded` `ChangeRepository.getDraft`, `getDiscarded`, `listDrafts`, and `listDiscarded` MUST map persisted manifests through these factories (or equivalent private construction in same module). Callers MUST NOT construct facades from arbitrary in-memory `Change` instances in production code.
- Artifact content: Loading artifact file content remains responsibility of `ChangeRepository.artifact` and related port methods when invoked with correct storage context. `ReadOnlyChangeView` types MUST NOT include artifact body content.

## Constraints
- ReadOnlyChangeView is TypeScript interface contract, not replacement for Change entity.
- Active changes continue to use Change via get / mutate.
